# Valid printf format strings pass without errors.

check-templates ./...
! stderr .

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"fmt"
	"html/template"
	"net/http"
)

var (
	//go:embed *.gohtml
	source embed.FS

	templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(source, "*"))
)

type Page struct {
	Name  string
	Count int
	Score float64
	OK    bool
}

func handleIndex(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = templates.ExecuteTemplate(w, "index.gohtml", Page{Name: "Alice", Count: 42, Score: 3.14, OK: true})
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint

-- index.gohtml --
{{printf "%s" .Name}}
{{printf "%d" .Count}}
{{printf "%f" .Score}}
{{printf "%v" .Name}}
{{printf "%t" .OK}}
{{printf "hello %%"}}
{{printf "%s has %d items" .Name .Count}}
